title: Cellular Resilience Support (Basic)™
tagline: Entry-level cellular support for periods of physiological demand
purpose: A streamlined, accessible formulation providing foundational cellular resilience support during periods of physiological demand. Designed as an introductory option for individuals new to the HTP System, using well-tolerated antioxidant botanicals at moderate doses.
supports: Normal antioxidant defense during periods of physiological demand
Healthy cellular resilience and adaptive response
Manageable daily supplementation for sensitive individuals
Foundation for transitioning to more comprehensive protocols under practitioner guidance
safetyNotes: Consult a qualified healthcare practitioner before use if pregnant, nursing, or managing any health condition.
Keep out of reach of children.
suitedFor: Adults new to structured nutritional supplementation
Individuals seeking accessible, well-tolerated cellular support
Those in discussion with a practitioner about initiating a more comprehensive HTP protocol
systemRole: This introductory formulation provides a gentle entry point to the HTP System's cellular resilience dimension. It may be used independently or as a stepping stone toward the Cellular Resilience Complex™ Core.
